docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TRUE. PLAINTIFF ROCHELLE SEYMORE IS PRESENT.
